description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a rectangular layout. The front of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor seating, sun loungers, and a pergola-covered dining space. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The property is enclosed by low walls and landscaped with rows of tall, slender trees and hedges for privacy. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and additional lounge chairs, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The exterior is finished in light neutral tones, with contrasting dark accents on the patio and poolside areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a spacious patio with a pool and outdoor seating. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and landscaped greenery for privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, patio with pergola, outdoor dining, and pool area with sun loungers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped greenery, privacy walls, and partial view of the patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, large windows, and the row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool, lounge chairs, and the open layout of the outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide glass door under a pergola, with steps leading to a covered patio and outdoor seating area.
